name: Japan
clues: Known as the Land of the Rising Sun.
Famous for sushi and cherry blossoms.
An archipelago in East Asia with its capital in Tokyo.

name: Brazil
clues: Largest country in South America.
Famous for its annual Carnival and the Amazon rainforest.
Hosted the 2014 FIFA World Cup and 2016 Summer Olympics.

name: France
clues: Home to the Eiffel Tower and the Louvre Museum.
Famous for its wine, cheese, and fashion.
The largest country in the European Union by land area.

name: Egypt
clues: Home to the ancient Pyramids of Giza.
The Nile River, the longest river in Africa, flows through it.
Located in the northeast corner of Africa.

name: Australia
clues: Commonly known as the 'Land Down Under'.
Home to the Great Barrier Reef and unique wildlife like kangaroos.
The world's largest island and smallest continent.

name: India
clues: The second most populous country in the world.
Home to the Taj Mahal, one of the New Seven Wonders of the World.
Known for its diverse culture and spicy cuisine.

name: Canada
clues: The second-largest country in the world by total area.
Famous for its maple syrup and ice hockey.
Has the longest coastline of any country in the world.

name: Italy
clues: Shaped like a boot and located in Southern Europe.
Known for its pizza, pasta, and Renaissance art.
Home to the city of Venice and the Colosseum.

name: South Africa
clues: Known as the 'Rainbow Nation' due to its multicultural diversity.
Famous for its wildlife safaris and Table Mountain.
The southernmost country on the African continent.

name: Mexico
clues: Famous for its ancient Mayan and Aztec ruins.
Known for its vibrant culture, tacos, and tequila.
Located in the southern part of North America.
